docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,686.00 FILED BY PORTILLO, HILDA AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTILLO, HILDA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-06-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-14-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARTA RIESEN PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANTS DAUGHTER VIRIDIANA NUNO INTERPRETS ON HER BEHALF.SPANISH INTERPRETER REQUESTED FOR MARCH 14, 2008. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
